artPrompt: A swelling translucent ooze brimming inside dented buckets, murky green flesh glowing with sickly bioluminescence as it engulfs rusted pipe-ends, faint drifting litter suspended in its body, bubbling toxic runoff at its base under a bruised stormy sky, rust-red stains streaking the concrete behind, the slime grotesque yet rendered with tender melancholic light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Bucket Brigade Ooze
text:
Feed (Whenever a player rolls one or more dice, flips one or more coins, or votes, put a sludge counter on this creature.)
Bucket Brigade Ooze gets +1/+1 for each sludge counter on it.
flavorText: The volunteers brought buckets. The buckets came back heavier and slightly alive.
